bio.p1: As a Full Stack Web Developer specialized in the Next.js, .NET, and TypeScript ecosystems, I have been developing e-commerce solutions for global marketplaces such as Amazon, eBay, Trendyol, and Hepsiburada since 2021.
bio.p2: I build scalable applications around multi-marketplace API integrations, workflow automation, and performance-oriented system architectures.
bio.p3: At Pronist Software and Consulting as a Full Stack Web Developer, I develop web apps with Next.js, .NET, SQL Server, and TypeScript, taking technical leadership and architecture ownership in e-commerce operations. I build workflow automations with Node.js and n8n, and develop CRM projects with a Next.js frontend and .NET backend.
bio.p4: I focus on sustainable software through NestJS, DDD, CQRS, and Clean Architecture in Agile/Scrum environments. I am a Computer Engineering graduate of Biruni University.

education.title: Computer Engineering
education.description: Bachelor's degree. Academic foundation focused on software development, system architecture, and modern web technologies.

internship.title: Intern / Backend Web Developer
internship.company: Yildiz Technical University · Information Technologies and Cyber Security Unit · Istanbul
internship.description: Built a multi-layered web application architecture using the .NET Core Identity Framework; implemented user authentication and authorization with strong security mechanisms. Designed role-based and claim-based authorization strategies; established JWT-based authentication for a secure and scalable identity management infrastructure.

pronist.title: Full Stack Web Developer
pronist.description: Developed web applications with Next.js, .NET, SQL Server, and TypeScript using modern UI/UX principles. Led e-commerce marketplace API integrations for Amazon, Trendyol, and Hepsiburada, achieving ~80% process optimization and owning ~85% of technical direction. Automated e-commerce workflows with Node.js and n8n, reducing manual work by ~70%. Built a CRM with Next.js frontend (~85%) and .NET backend integration (100%). Worked in Agile/Scrum with cross-functional teams.
